creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
This is probably not a bug. For future reference: <https://www.freebsd.org/community/> describes some available community support options. 

----

The brief guide below should help you to discover the cause of absence of any package.

Using package build records at pkg-status.freebsd.org
<https://people.freebsd.org/~grahamperrin/pkg-status/>


(In reply to Federico Almanzar from comment #1)

Which version of FreeBSD, exactly? 

freebsd-version -kru ; uname -aKU

Also, please share output from this command: 

pkg -vv | grep -e url -e enabled -e priority
